name: V3 systemic repair smoke suite
purpose: Small diagnostic suite for source currentness, policy specificity, natural transitions, and immediate follow-ups. It is not a launch holdout and must not be used for prompt-specific rules.

conversations.title: Qualification and natural conversation
prompts: Hi there. Can you help me check a few qualification situations?
Can a doctor employed by a hospital qualify even if they do not own a private practice?
What about a nurse at the same hospital?
Can a minor be accepted for a show?

conversations.title: Payment policy specificity
prompts: I need help with payments now.
Can filming happen before the client has paid the full balance?
If an ACH debit shows as confirmed, is that enough to treat the money as cleared?
If a client is paying monthly, can they upgrade from Standard to VIP before filming?

conversations.title: Calls and ownership follow-ups
prompts: A prospect booked with two reps. Who should handle the client?
How do I find which rep was booked first?
If they no-show Call 1, what contact attempts should I make?
So should I reschedule if they join late?

conversations.title: Proof and offer boundaries
prompts: Where is the approved testimonials page I can send to a prospect?
For DJ Lite, should I bring up trailer marketing if there are no guaranteed views?
Can I promise when an episode will be available on Amazon?
